note.zh: 在 Claude Code 中以 Claude Fable 5（High 思考配额）生成的完整 Vite + React 18 + three.js 工程；本页为其构建产物（部署时由源码打包为单文件）。手动修复了一处开火 bug：模拟以固定 64Hz 步长推进，高刷屏（渲染帧率高于 64）下某一帧可能不推进任何 fixed step，原实现按帧写入并清零 fireTap 等 edge 触发输入，会在该帧把点击吞掉、导致偶发不开火；修复改为用 || 将这些输入锁存至被某个 fixed step 消费为止（src/game/engine.ts），使开火与刷新率无关。
note.en: A complete Vite + React 18 + three.js project generated by Claude Fable 5 (High effort) in Claude Code; this page is its build output (bundled from source into a single file at deploy time). One firing bug was fixed by hand: the simulation advances in fixed 64Hz steps, and on a high-refresh display (render fps above 64) a frame may run zero fixed steps, so the original per-frame assign-and-clear of edge-triggered inputs like fireTap could swallow a click on that frame and drop the shot; the fix latches those inputs with || until a fixed step consumes them (src/game/engine.ts), making firing refresh-rate-independent.

note.zh: Claude Fable 5(High 思考档位)在 Claude Code 中用仓库标准中文提示词(仅按案例规则填写文末【本次运行】占位符)一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行,任何 bug 均不修复。自命名「疾风圈地」。诊断:策略翻车,龟缩到极致:圈了 164 次却每次平均仅 3.9 格,勤劳画小圈、画一个被对手大圈盖一个,0 死 0 杀,终局仅 165 分。与 Opus xhigh 同病更甚——名叫疾风,啃得太碎。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by Claude Fable 5 (High effort) in Claude Code from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt (only the [This run] placeholders filled per case rules), with no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished and no bug is ever fixed; this registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "疾风圈地". Diagnosis: Strategic failure, turtling to the extreme: 164 captures averaging just 3.9 cells each — swift tiny loops instantly overwritten by the opponent's bigger ones, 0 deaths and 0 kills, ending at only 165. The same trap as Opus xhigh but worse — swift name, bites too small.
